title: Is renewal and Platinum the same
display_title: Is renewal and Platinum the same
wikitext:
[]: Is renewal and Platinum the same?             Quote Post by Kye7 » Thu Oct 13, 2011 6:56 am In the sense that they were both 'digitally remastered'? I'm a bit confused... Most people recommend platinum, but others say renewal, and I'm really confused So which has better quality and audio? Or are they the same? http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_End_of_Evangelion#The_End_of_Evangelion:_Renewal Also... it mentions Renewal of Evangelion box set (which compiled "new digitally remastered versions of the 26 TV show episodes, 4 remade-for-Laserdisc episodes, and 3 theatrical features" as well as "a bonus disc with never-before-seen material "

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Oct 13, 2011 7:45 am I think the platinums are the same digitally remastered episodes as renewal but with different ...heh...bonus material like that ridiculous 'mythology of eva' thing and Tiff Grant commentating a slide-show of her eva merchandise.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 13, 2011 8:48 am Platinum is adapted from Renewal. The key difference is that Platinum does not include the movies. There are also some differences in extras and packaging, but for all intents and purposes, Platinum is Renewal.

[]: Re: Is renewal and Platinum the same?             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Oct 13, 2011 10:28 am Kye7 wrote: Most people recommend platinum, but others say renewal, and I'm really confused

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Thu Oct 13, 2011 3:13 pm Jayfive wrote: I think the platinums are the same digitally remastered episodes as renewal but with different ...heh...bonus material like that ridiculous 'mythology of eva' thing and Tiff Grant commentating a slide-show of her eva merchandise.

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Thu Oct 13, 2011 3:27 pm Renewal is Japanese, Platinum is English. Platinum was based on the Japanese remasters, and they remastered the audio of the dub. ...I'm pretty sure that's what any of us should have said from the start, right? Since, you know, that's a pretty major difference...

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Thu Oct 13, 2011 3:28 pm Sephizim wrote: Renewal is Japanese, Platinum is English. Platinum was based on the Japanese remasters, and they remastered the audio of the dub. ...I'm pretty sure that's what any of us should have said from the start, right? Since, you know, that's a pretty major difference...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 13, 2011 4:49 pm Kye7 wrote: I know the audio was remastered, but what about the video? Like in 2003 when they re-mastered EoE. Did they do that for 1-26?

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Thu Oct 13, 2011 5:52 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Obviously they did it, you'd be surprised if you were to compare it against the old DVDs (including the Japanese one). It's mentioned in the wiki as well, anyway the process was less than perfect in some circumstances because of lost negatives but even that infamous episode 16 is still an improvement over the old pre-Renewal version. Regarding the differences between Renewal and Platinum, the Renewal offers higher quality since it's progressively encoded , [s]anyway for most people it's hardly an improvement that would justify the roughly ten times higher price.[/s]

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Oct 13, 2011 9:27 pm Why is this conversation going in circles? Ok, I'll lay it all down for you Kye7: Renewal is the Japanese release of both the series and the movies remastered . It includes no English. Platinum is the Renewal release repackaged with the English sub and dub , without the films (because ADV did not have the rights to release the films in America), and a different encoding. For all intents and purposes it has the exact same quality of the Renewal release, but it includes English. I hope that helps your understanding.

[]:             Quote Post by Seen » Fri Oct 14, 2011 12:54 am Does anyone have comparison shots of the original footage and the renewal footage?

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Fri Oct 14, 2011 6:44 am Fazmotron wrote: Why is this conversation going in circles? Ok, I'll lay it all down for you Kye7: Renewal is the Japanese release of both the series and the movies remastered . It includes no English. Platinum is the Renewal release repackaged with the English sub and dub , without the films (because ADV did not have the rights to release the films in America), and a different encoding. For all intents and purposes it has the exact same quality of the Renewal release, but it includes English. I hope that helps your understanding.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Oct 14, 2011 10:06 am Seen wrote: Does anyone have comparison shots of the original footage and the renewal footage?
